name: hit-communications
description: API REST para gerenciamento de incidentes operacionais da HIT Communications.

scripts.bench:prepare: npm run prisma:migrate:dev && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.bench:stack:observability: docker compose --profile api --profile observability up --build -d api grafana loki alloy
scripts.bench:smoke: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/smoke.js
scripts.bench:baseline: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/baseline.js
scripts.bench:load: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/load.js
scripts.bench:stress: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/stress.js
scripts.bench:spike: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/spike.js
scripts.bench:soak: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/soak.js
scripts.k6:smoke: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/smoke.js
scripts.k6:baseline: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/baseline.js
scripts.k6:load: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/load.js
scripts.k6:stress: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/stress.js
scripts.k6:spike: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/spike.js
scripts.k6:soak: docker compose --profile api --profile benchmark run --rm k6 run /scripts/scenarios/soak.js
